footer_copy: Paths for comparison only — simulation and research support, not trade recommendations.

paths.label: Own shares
paths.headline: Full upside and downside — no expiry
paths.capital_shape: 100% of position at risk on spot move

paths.label: Bull call spread (LEAPS)
paths.headline: Defined-risk bullish options structure
paths.capital_shape: Net debit at risk; capped upside above short strike
pros: Lower cost than naked long call
cons: Upside capped at short call strike

paths.label: Long LEAPS call
paths.headline: Leveraged upside with premium at risk
paths.capital_shape: Premium at risk; leverage vs spot
pros: Less capital than owning shares for similar upside bias
cons: Time decay; must be right before expiry

paths.label: Sector ETF (SMH)
paths.headline: Broader semiconductor exposure — not single-name
paths.capital_shape: ETF shares at risk on sector move
